sections.title: 1. Home & streaks
steps: Tap + to add a streak — name, emoji, quit or build mode.
Tap a streak card for detail view and progress ring.
Swipe or use menu to edit, reset, or delete a streak.
Reset keeps your all-time best record.

sections.title: 2. Goals & records
steps: Set a goal when creating or editing a streak.
Records tab shows totals, bests, and goals reached.
Compare streaks on the in-app leaderboard.

sections.title: 3. Widgets & share
steps: Long-press home screen → add Time Since widget.
Choose streak and style (classic, minimal, bold; ring on Premium).
Share tab generates a streak card image for social or messages.

sections.title: 4. Premium & settings
steps: Free: up to 3 streaks, 1 widget, ad-supported.
Premium: unlimited streaks, 5 widgets, extra styles, no ads — one-time purchase.
Settings → Go Premium or Restore purchases.
Language picker: 12 locales including Hebrew and Arabic (RTL).

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Accounts, data, Premium, platforms, and health disclaimers.

items.question: What is Time Since?
items.answer: Time Since is a streak tracker for iOS and Android. Count days since you quit something or consecutive days you're building a habit — with goal rings, records, widgets, and share cards. Android package: com.zuki.apps.timesince.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No. Open the app and add a streak. There is no sign-up or login.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: Streak titles, dates, and counts stay on your device. Uninstalling the app removes your streaks. We do not operate a cloud account for streak content.

items.question: Is Time Since a medical or sobriety treatment app?
items.answer: No. It is a personal tracking tool. For substance use support, consult a qualified professional.

items.question: How does Premium work?
items.answer: One-time in-app purchase (com.zuki.apps.timesince.premium): unlimited streaks, up to 5 home screen widgets, premium widget and share styles, and no ads. Restore from Settings with your Apple ID or Google account.

items.question: Why are there ads in the free version?
items.answer: The free tier supports up to 3 streaks with optional banner and interstitial ads. Premium removes all ads forever — no subscription.

items.question: What if I relapse or miss a day?
items.answer: Reset the streak in one tap. Your all-time best record is kept so you can start fresh without losing history.

items.question: Do widgets work on iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes. Pin a streak on your home screen; widgets update daily. Premium unlocks up to 5 widgets and the ring style.

items.question: Which languages are supported?
items.answer: 12 languages: English, Hebrew, Arabic, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Chinese (Simplified).

items.question: Is there an iPad version?
items.answer: Yes. Time Since supports iPhone, iPad, and Android phones and tablets in portrait and landscape.

items.question: How do I get support?
items.answer: Email zuki.apps@gmail.com or visit https://zukiapps.com/timesince/support. Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/timesince/privacy

items.question: Where can I download Time Since?
items.answer: iOS: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/time-since-streak-tracker/id6787023926 · Android: coming soon on Google Play (com.zuki.apps.timesince) · Product page: https://zukiapps.com/timesince

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Time Since handles your data

q1.question: How do I add my first streak?
q1.answer: Open Time Since and tap Add a streak. Name it, pick quit or build mode, optionally set a goal, and save. No account required.

q2.question: What happens if I reset a streak?
q2.answer: The active counter restarts from zero. Your all-time best day count is preserved in Records.

q3.question: How do I add a home screen widget?
q3.answer: On iOS or Android, long-press the home screen → Widgets → Time Since → choose your streak and style. Premium unlocks up to 5 widgets.

q4.question: Premium didn't activate after purchase
q4.answer: Open Settings → Restore purchases. Use the same Apple ID or Google account you used to buy.

q5.question: Are my streaks backed up to the cloud?
q5.answer: No. Streak data is stored locally on your device. Export share cards or note start dates if you need a manual backup.

q6.question: Where is the full FAQ?
q6.answer: See the FAQ on the Time Since product page or read public/timesince/faq.md on zukiapps.com for answer-engine friendly copy.

additionalHelp.title: Need more help?
additionalHelp.description: If you could not find an answer, email zuki.apps@gmail.com. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Time Since — local streak storage, optional ads and analytics SDKs, Premium purchase, no account required.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zuki Apps (“we”, “us”) handles information when you use the Time Since mobile application and related pages at zukiapps.com/timesince (the “Service”). Time Since stores your streak content on your device. We do not require an account.

section1.title: 1. Who we are
section1.content: The data controller for Time Since is Zuki Apps. Contact details are at the end of this Policy.
section1.content2: This Policy applies to the Time Since app (iOS and Android) and the legal pages we publish for the product.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: Streak titles, start dates, counts, and related app settings are stored locally on your device and are not transmitted to our servers.
items: Streak content: local only — not collected on our servers
Device or advertising IDs (AdMob): may be used for ads in the free version
App interaction and crash data (Firebase Analytics / Crashlytics): aggregated diagnostics
Purchase status: confirmed via Apple App Store or Google Play billing
Support email: if you contact us directly

section3.title: 3. How we use information
items: Provide streak tracking, widgets, records, and share features
Show ads in the free tier (Google AdMob)
Measure app stability and usage via analytics SDKs
Process optional Premium purchases through the app stores
section3.content2: We do not sell your personal information. We do not upload your streak content to our servers.

section4.title: 4. Advertising and analytics
section4.content: The free version may show banner and interstitial ads via Google AdMob. Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics may collect limited device and usage data as described in Google’s policies.
section4.content2: Premium removes ads. On iOS, the app may request App Tracking Transparency permission for personalized ads.

section5.title: 5. Storage and retention
section5.content: Streak data remains on your device until you delete streaks or uninstall the app. We do not operate a user account or cloud backup for streak content in v0.9.0.
section5.content2: Support emails are retained as long as needed to resolve your request.

section6.title: 6. Purchases
section6.content: Premium (com.zuki.apps.timesince.premium) is a one-time non-consumable purchase billed by Apple or Google. Payment is handled by the store; we receive only entitlement confirmation.
section6.content2: Restore purchases from Settings with the same store account.

section7.title: 7. Your rights and children
section7.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise rights.
section7.content2: Time Since is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your country). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new “Last updated” date.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Use for Time Since — streak tracker app, Premium purchase, acceptable use, and disclaimers.
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Time Since. By downloading, installing, or using the app, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your use of Time Since (“Service”, “App”) operated by Zuki Apps (“we”, “us”). If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Time Since is a personal streak and day-counter app. The Service includes:
items: Quit and build mode streak tracking

section3.title: 3. Not medical advice
section3.content: Time Since is a personal tracking tool only. It is not a medical device, sobriety treatment program, or substitute for professional health advice.
section3.content2: For substance use or mental health support, consult a qualified professional.

section4.title: 4. Premium and purchases
section4.content: Optional Premium is a one-time in-app purchase billed by Apple or Google. Refunds follow the store’s policies. Product ID: com.zuki.apps.timesince.premium.
section4.content2: Features and pricing may change with notice where required by law.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable use
items: Reverse engineer the app except as permitted by law
Use the Service for unlawful purposes
Interfere with ads, analytics, or security features

section6.title: 6. Disclaimer
section6.content: The Service is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
section6.content2: Your streak data is stored locally; you are responsible for backing up information you care about.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
section7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may modify these Terms. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance.
